$note: Allowlist for scripts/check-zod-escape-hatches.mjs. Each entry: { file: <repo-rel path>, pattern: <one of: passthrough|catchall-any|catchall-unknown|z.any|z.unknown>, reason: <why this instance is justified, including the burndown task that will eliminate it> }. Net direction is monotonic-shrink: tasks #164–#167 remove entries as the underlying schemas are tightened. New hits outside this allowlist fail CI immediately.
